answer: Metadata extraction success rate was impacted because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown, so metadata came from body_text_only instead of yaml_frontmatter; remediation is to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files, with validation marker concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
